testcase.name: test_book_emits_two_resend_ok_lines

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 2 'Resend OK' lines (student+pro booking confirmations), got 1. Backend log slice: 2026-06-24 15:31:02,182 - INFO - Resend OK to=test_stu_iter31_87672d@resend.dev subject=ReferME · Mock Interview confirmed id=a39dd784-65bb-4c46-a9ee-c7205aa6d853 2026-06-24 15:31:02,329 - WARNING - Resend send failed (ReferME · New Mock Interview booking): Too many requests.
